title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament, advancing to the next round.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's continued success in the ACC Tournament boosts team morale and fan engagement.

title: Virginia Secures ACC Tournament Win Against NC State
summary: Virginia defeats NC State 81- in the ACC Tournament, continuing their winning streak this season.
charlotte_impact: Another win for Virginia reinforces their strong performance in the ACC Tournament.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Predictions
summary: Preview of the NC State Wolfpack versus No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers ACC Tournament quarterfinal game.

title: Severe Storms Expected in Charlotte Area
summary: Charlotte area braces for multiple rounds of strong-to-severe storms, with potential for damaging winds and tornadoes.
charlotte_impact: Residents need to prepare for potentially dangerous weather conditions.

title: Fatal Shooting in Hickory; Suspect Charged
summary: One dead and two injured in a Hickory shooting; a suspect is charged with murder and attempted murder.

title: Woman Charged with Kidnapping in Lincoln County
summary: A woman is charged with kidnapping a child in Lincoln County after leaving with her own children and another child.

summary: One person was stabbed in east Charlotte and taken to the hospital with serious injuries.

title: Charlotte Airport Operational Despite TSA Shutdown
summary: Charlotte Douglas Airport remains operational with low security wait times despite the government shutdown.

title: Fatal Hit-and-Run in Charlotte; Police Seek Suspect
summary: A 23-year-old woman died in a hit-and-run in Charlotte; police are searching for the driver who fled on foot.

title: Shooting Near West Charlotte Hotel Sparks Safety Concerns
summary: Two people were shot near the Loyalty Inn in west Charlotte, marking the fifth violent incident in a year, raising safety concerns.
